surfaces.card_interactive: bg-[#121214] border border-[#27272a] hover:border-[#3f3f46] hover:-translate-y-[1px] transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer rounded-none
surfaces.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#09090b]/80 border-b border-[#27272a] sticky top-0 z-50

status_badges.IN_STOCK: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#00FF66]/10 text-[#00FF66] border border-[#00FF66]/20
status_badges.OOS: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider bg-white/5 text-[#A1A1AA] border border-white/10
status_badges.QUEUED: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#FFCC00]/10 text-[#FFCC00] border border-[#FFCC00]/20
status_badges.ERROR: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20
status_badges.PURCHASED: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#007AFF]/10 text-[#007AFF] border border-[#007AFF]/20

retailer_tags.style: font-mono text-xs text-[#A1A1AA] bg-[#18181b] px-1.5 py-0.5 border border-[#27272a]

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#3395FF] rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-bold tracking-wide text-sm transition-colors
buttons.kill_switch_start: bg-[#00FF66]/10 text-[#00FF66] border border-[#00FF66]/50 hover:bg-[#00FF66]/20 rounded-none px-4 py-1.5 font-bold uppercase text-xs tracking-wider
buttons.kill_switch_stop: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF3B30]/90 rounded-none px-4 py-1.5 font-bold uppercase text-xs tracking-wider
buttons.brave_connect: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border border-[#FF6B00] text-[#FF6B00] hover:bg-[#FF6B00]/10 transition-colors rounded-none

terminal.logs_container: p-3 font-mono text-[11px] text-[#A1A1AA] h-[300px] overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex flex-col gap-1

table.header: text-xs font-black tracking-[0.1em] text-[#A1A1AA] uppercase border-b border-[#27272a] bg-[#09090b]/50

layout.desktop: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6

bento_spans.side_panel: col-span-1 row-span-2 flex flex-col gap-4 sm:gap-6

animations.shimmer: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-translate-x-full before:animate-[shimmer_2s_infinite] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-white/5 before:to-transparent

icons.strategy: Minimal use of icons. Use geometric shapes and solid colors. Terminal aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust command-center dashboard tailored for a technical scalper/bot operator.
Enforce 'The Performance Pro' archetype. Use sharp edges (rounded-none), solid dark colors (#09090b base), and 1px borders. NO SOFT SHADOWS OR PASTELS.
Implement the bento grid 'Control Room' layout for high data density.
Main monitor table should list Watchlist items with their status. Use 'components.status_badges' for consistent styling. Add a pulsing dot for 'IN STOCK'.
Retailer columns should use minimalist text brackets instead of heavy logos, e.g., '[ AMZN ]', '[ WMRT ]', '[ PKMN ]', using the 'retailer_tags' style.
Brave CDP connection should be displayed in the sticky header with the Brave brand color (#FF6B00).
The Global 'Start All / Stop All' kill switch must be prominent in the header.
Terminal Log panel must stay anchored to bottom, use JetBrains Mono, and color-code lines by log level.
Use Chivo font for headings, Inter for body/UI, and JetBrains Mono for prices, counts, and logs.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and key status badges.
Incorporate a Drop Scheduler section showing a visual countdown timer component with a mono font.
Forms (Profiles, Global Settings) should use dense, technical Shadcn Form/Input components with rounded-none styling.
